hibernate-mapping.query: select mmt from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction mmt left outer join com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FsetFilingDetail fset on fset.MoneyMovementTransaction=mmt and fset.Company=mmt.Company where fset is null and mmt.PaymentTemplate.PaymentTemplateCd='MS-M89-PAYMENT' and mmt.TaxPaymentStatus = 'AcknowledgedByAgency' and mmt.Status = 'Executed' and mmt.InitiationDate = :InitDate and mmt.MoneyMovementPaymentMethod = 'ACHCredit'
